---
title: 'catalog pull'
---

Pull the active catalog's commits and annex content from its configured remotes.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog pull
```

This command takes no command-specific options.

## Example

```bash
xorq catalog pull
```

## See also

- [`catalog push`](push.qmd)—push to remotes
- [`catalog sync`](sync.qmd)—pull then push
